## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and outreach campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO progress: 111 articles published, 18 more coming soon; indexation issues resolved, seeing positive momentum](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [New industry page template concept introduced for programmatic SEO and improved user experience](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Outbound campaigns showing success: 45% email open rate, positive responses from agency owners](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Webinar scheduled for March 20th; need to coordinate marketing efforts and workflow details](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

## Topics

### SEO and Content Progress

  - [111 articles published to date, 18 more coming in next few days](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [New focus on AI agents content cluster](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [45 clicks at 45 days post-publishing; healthy growth expected at 90-day mark](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Overall brand traffic showing growth](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Indexation issues resolved:](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Added dynamic canonical field in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Implemented self-referencing canonicals](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Resubmitted sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Seeing positive trends in indexation speed](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### New Industry Page Template

  - [Concept for programmatic SEO-friendly industry pages introduced](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Template to include:](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Relevant videos or images](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Associated use cases](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [AI applications for the industry](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Aim to create a repeatable process for identifying and adding use cases](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [First draft to be shared by Wednesday next week](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Focus on addressing user needs and concerns for better conversion](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Media Elements and Use Cases

  - [Need for more media elements (videos, images, demos, GIFs)](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Request for access to use case spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Exploring AI-powered workflow to identify and place images in blogs](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

  - [7 backlinks placed and indexed, more in progress](https://fathom.video/share/YD28D6GBW9sJB_GZCJm4EVubmzGGbo5P?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
